title: ornithogalum hortense
intro: Ornithogalum hortense, also known as the Star of Bethlehem, is a type of flowering perennial plant that belongs to the lily family and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ornithogalum hortense include its ability to reduce fever, soothe coughs, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential side effects.
